_doc: Free-tier parameter manifest for the Sound Generator 2.0 iteration loop (docs/SOUND_GENERATOR_2_PLAN.md §2.4). Only optimiser-adjustable params are listed; pinned-tier params (set directly from measurement) are named at the bottom. Bounds mirror the sub-note inspector knobs (app.js chInspectorHTML) so every fitted preset is reachable and editable in the UI. WP-4 consumes this file; WP-9's ledger keys off the same names.

bodyType.values: enumerate at runtime: 'auto' + Object.keys(BODY_PRESETS) from web/static/synth.js
bodyType.note: candidate set restricted per family before optimisation (e.g. sung → vocal bodies + auto)

continuous.note: T-008: sustained breath is not a struck/plucked noise floor
1 preserves the legacy sustained-air level
1 preserves legacy linear scaling; lower values retain more breath relative to tone at pp
neutral at 0; adds seeded continuous level/colour texture
neutral at 0; routes turbulence through the fitted body bands
shape/freq/decay of the transient are pinned from measurement; only the level is free
neutral legacy routing at 0; opt in when the note ADSR masks a measured fast onset
1 preserves legacy linear velocity scaling; lower values retain more onset at soft dynamics
initialised from measured performance statistics; free only while the vibrato feature carries weight
initialised from measured performance statistics; permits render-side calibration of the measured target
initialised from measured performance statistics; permits render-side calibration of the measured target
neutral at 0; onset-only harmonic tilt that settles into the sustained print
settling time for onset-spectrum tilt; inert while tilt is 0
neutral at 0; couples one articulation-strength draw inversely to plosive/breath-lead/scoop outputs
mean tongued/accented strength for the shared onset latent variable
neutral at 0; Human-scaled seeded per-note articulation distribution
neutral at 0; fitted within-instrument dynamic bias of the shared articulation-strength latent (T-025/L9)
measured weak-articulation phrase-start scoop depth at Human 1; Human 0 and depth 0 are exact pitch
measured scoop settling time; inert while depth is 0
inside-phrase scoop fraction; legato remains exactly zero
neutral at 0; fitted log-f0 scaling of scoop demand
neutral at 0; fitted within-instrument dynamic scaling, normally negative when soft underplaying scoops more
pinned to suggestedMaterial where a T60 fit exists; free only for instruments without free-decay evidence
strength of the measured per-partial dynamic law; bowed brightness is force-driven, not position-driven
conditional audit enables a non-neutral late/early ratio
conditional audit enables the second-stage amount

structured.bodyBands: per-band {freq,gain,width} trims on the selected body preset; gains free within ±6 dB of preset, freq/width free within ±15% — fitted after the continuous pass, one band at a time
structured.spectralPartialMeans: per-partial level offsets vs the computed print; fitted CLOSED-FORM from the reference spectra (never by the optimiser)
structured.attackNoiseByRegister: pinned {f0,levelScale,freq,q,decay} anchors; measured/triaged per register after the global onset fit
structured.envelopeAttackByRegister: pinned {f0,attack} anchors from WP-3 register envelope evidence
structured.envelopeAttackByRegisterDynamic: pinned bowed {register,dynamic,midi,f0,attack,meanBandT90Ms,bandT90Ms,onsetLockinPeriods} anchors; T-048 consumer pending

pinnedFromMeasurement: spectralPartialMeans base tables (per register once G1 lands)
materialT60 fit (t60Ref, slope) where free decay was measured

fixed._note: density pinned at 64 during fitting (audibility culling handles cost); presets may ship lower only if the A/B audition can't tell the difference
